message:
test(sync): add cancelled-then-repoll barrier test

New test barrier_cancelled_wait_second_poll_fails_closed verifies that
a barrier wait future which resolves via cancellation on the first poll
correctly returns PolledAfterCompletion on subsequent polls, ensuring
the Done state guard works for the cancellation path as well as the
normal completion path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
